info.title: static
info.description: Static is a simple static files HTTP server, as a global tool.

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: Command.Parse, OK: Command.Parse, OK: CommandLineParser.Parse, OK: CommandLineParser.Parse, OK: ParseResult.Invoke, OK: ParseErrorAction.Invoke, OK: HelpAction.Invoke, OK: ParseResult.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

options.name: --port
options.description: The port to listen for the server. [default: 8080]

options.name: --path
options.description: The path to start the server. [default: .]

options.name: --allow-directory-browsing
options.description: Allow directory browsing the server files under the path. This options if conflict with --mirror. [default: False]

options.name: --mirror
options.description: The website to mirror. Automatically proxy the file if the file is not found in the server. This option if conflict with --allow-directory-browsing.

options.name: --cache-mirror
options.description: Cache the mirrored files. This will save the mirrored files to the server's disk. [default: False]

options.name: --enable-webdav
options.description: Enable WebDAV for the server. This is a read-only WebDAV server. [default: False]

options.name: --enable-webdav-write
options.description: Enable write access for the WebDAV server. This will allow the client to write files to the server. However, this requires the server process to run with write permission. [default: False]

options.name: --not-found-page
options.description: Specifies a custom 404 page to be served when a requested file is not found. This file should reside in the server's root folder. If this option is left blank or not set, a default 404 response will be returned.
